name: 05 - Realistic Smoke Suite
description: Fast smoke test — 12 representative questions across difficulty levels. Use this before the full run to catch regressions in 3-5 minutes.

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets in total?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are open right now?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OpenTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created today?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Today FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does each entity have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets did Sara Hassan create?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS SaraTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Sara' AND u.LastName = 'Hassan' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets created this week.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this month vs last month.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'ThisMonth' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'LastMonth', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Top 5 users by tickets created.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: What is the average resolution time in hours?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts by status and source.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, src.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, src.Name ORDER BY s.Name, src.Name

Scenarios.Question: Daily ticket creation count for the last 14 days.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -14, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: Update ticket TCK-2026-00001 to status Closed.
